TunnelBox is a Hardware Gateway To Expose Your Local Servers & AI Models Publicly A dedicated hardware gateway that connects your local services to the public internet without touching your router configurations.
View On Kickstarter
Expose Local Servers

Put Your Local Service on A Public URL

Localhost
🤖AI Local Model
🔗Services
💻Local Servers
Tunnel Stack
TunnelBox
Servers
🌐Public URL
Why a hardware solution?

Developers should focus on what they love: building. A hardware ingress that handles all networking and traffic before it reaches your service. So, no need for complex network configurations or other headaches to get your local services to the public.

  • Forwards traffic to your local machine automatically, so you don’t touch router rules.
  • Keeps local development private by default, exposing only what you choose.
  • Centralizes routing for multiple devices in one place.
  • Lowers misconfiguration risk compared to manual network setup.
The features that make tunneling simplier

Tunnelbox offers an array of features in connecting your services to the world.

Plug & Play

Plug it into power and your router, complete a quick setup, and you’re live. No network configurations.

Zero Touch Setup

No need to touch your router. Once the Box is plugged in and setup, your local service is exposed to the public.

Free Managed Domains

Depending on your subscription, create multiple public domains per port.

Automatic SSL / TLS

Every domain comes with HTTPS out of the box. Certificates are issued and renewed automatically.

End-to-End Encryption

All traffic is encrypted between TunnelBox and end user, ensuring secure communication.

One Box To Connect Multiple Machines

Expose multiple local services from a single TunnelBox. Route traffic to different ports, containers, or services without additional hardware

Easily Control Where Your Traffic Goes

With a simple configuration on the TunnelBox Console, easily manage where your traffic goes.

Built for Developers

Designed for developers shipping fast. Expose localhost for webhooks and APIs, share live demos, or publish AI inference endpoints in seconds.

Regular Updates

Security patches, firmware upgrades, and new features are delivered keeping your gateway secure and optimized.

One Year of Free Subscription

Every device includes one year of TunnelBox service — including managed domains, SSL, and updates.

Who is Tunnelbox for?
Hobbyists & Students
Developers
Teams & Startups
